name: claude-doom-statusbar
description: DOOM-inspired status bar for the Claude Code CLI — a mugshot that tracks session health, plus usage, model, project, system, and a live subagent list.

scripts.test: node test/installer.test.mjs && node test/smoke.test.mjs && node test/hook-tasks.test.mjs && node test/statusline-tasks.test.mjs && node test/render-scroll.test.mjs && node test/e2e-tasks.test.mjs
